business_angle: BBR Plumbing & Heating Bristol - Bristol Boiler Repairs: heating and plumbing with tidy finishes
distinctive_phrases: They also prioritised the work as our existing boiler had broken
Installation was completed on time and the work was tidy and unobtrusive
Chris completely redid my heating system having bought a house with very old plumbing system
His prices were fair in comparison and also considering his level of expertise and experience
Chris and the chaps installed our boiler, radiators, two bathrooms, underfloor heating and powerflushed the system

strongest_review_quote.text:
Bristol Boiler Repairs, and in particular Chris, were very helpful in providing quotes for 3 boilers and guiding us to the most appropriate one for our property.  They also prioritised the work as our existing boiler had broken.
Installation was completed on time and the work was tidy and unobtrusive.
We have no hesitation in recommending Bristol Boiler Repairs as both cost effective and reliable.
strongest_review_quote.author: Mark
